of the claim lines in the 
Part B carrier and DME data files, and a subset of physician evaluation and management (E/M) claims 
(NOTE: E/M are tabulated separately in this data file). 

The PHYS claim lines are defined as those with a line BETOS code (BETOS_CD) where the first three digits 
= “M1A” or “M1B” (the remainder of physician services which occur in different settings appear in 
EM_MDCR_PMT). The total Primary Payer Payments are calculated as the sum of the 
LINE_BENE_PRMRY_PYR_PD_AMT.
